Review Glimpse?

Reviews of Glimpse skew strongly positive, highlighting helpful trend discovery, richer keyword depth than default tools, and a massive database that aids SEO, PPC, and content planning. Users praise responsive support and approachable UX, noting real value for small businesses and niche markets. A few critiques call out high-tier paywalls, a spammy off-topic post, and occasional site performance issues on some browsers. Makers of other products commend its “Google Trends Supercharged” approach and growing community, citing faster insight generation and practical workflows for landing pages and market research.

results.title: Global Glimpse | Reviews and Programs | Go Overseas
results.content: How can I put my experience into words? To the facilities, to my friends, to the staff they truly are one of a kind. I really did not have a bad experience on this trip. Every single day taught me a valuable lesson in which I hope will remain with me in my future endeavors. I was able to witness the citizens experience life which truly struck a cord with me. On the last couple of days were spent on elementary school as we helped them make a better learning environment. How can I not recommend this experience to anybody else as it shaped who I am. I was nervous when I first applied to Global Glimpse but now I realize there was no need. The experience pushed me out of my comfort zone and made me more confident in who I am. I have recommended this to everybody I know who is younger than me. [...] All of that happened practically under my nose though because I was having a blast the whole time. I got to see a place I’ve never been to before, eat new foods, see great views of the land and meet amazing new people. Your peers are cooperative and genuinely want to connect with you, and the staff members are some of the most supportive people I’ve ever met in my life. I was having so much fun that I was almost SAD to not wake up at 6 AM cuz that would mean my day wouldn’t feel as long. [...] Something very notable is that the program is very authentic. They create a perfect balance of work and fun to make a worthwhile experience something you can actually enjoy. They speak a lot about being outside of your comfort zone and because of all of their encouragement (from home staff members, staff in Panama, zoom meetings, etc…) I was willing to take that extra step. I found that coming back from the program I am now more willing to work with others and come up with genuine solutions to problems. It has greatly lessened my fear of making my voice heard and now I want to do what I can to lead and make a positive difference around me. I seek out opportunity to be a leader rather than avoid it.

results.title: ‎Glimpse - Voice Journal - Ratings & Reviews - App Store
results.content:
Goodnight, Good Luck

  Every new year I pledge to myself that it’ll start journaling. I give it max a month before my fingers cannot possibly keep up with my mind. Glimpse gave me an outlet to let it out without a worry of phrasing things correctly (getting caught in the unnecessary stressors that I’m oh so prone to) and speaking to a neutral source. Good luck to my therapist, my notes are thorough now.
 ### Journaling on a whole new level

  sydjt

  I love this app! As someone who journals often, using voice entries has completely changed the game. It’s so cool having prompts to reflect on and being able to unpack my thoughts using AI. Also love the summary feature because it helps me remember events from the week. [...] # Glimpse - Voice Journal

## Ratings & Reviews

 4.8

  out of 5

  344 Ratings

 ### Give it a shot

  JGaul33

  I started using Glimpse bc I struggle to take the time to write, and I struggle with what to write. Glimpse lets you get the thoughts out in real time. Transcription needs some work, but you can review before you save. For $40 I recommend to any man struggling to take that first step.
 ### I actually journal now

  caander162 [...] caander162

  I always wanted to be the person with a ton of handwritten journals but it just takes too long. Voice to text journaling is literally perfect it’s like sending a voice note to your friends but it’s all written down for you to go back to and remember. The voice to text is super accurate but cleans up my filler words and the design is so clean. The ability to have AI recap my journal entries and provide insight is insanely cool. Highly recommend to anyone that’s always wanted to journal but just hasn’t gotten around to finding the time for it. You’ll thank yourself in 10 years!!! Love this app
 ### Best journaling app out there!

  ranoya12
